text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk down the hallway, I come across King
Halo and Fuji Kiseki chatting together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone gets together to dance? How splendid!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If the idea tickles your fancy, would you care to
join as well, my darling pony?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Really?! Why, I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then let us enjoy ourselves thoroughly on
the big day!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You there! Do come as well, should you desire.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You'll find that the invitation is already... in your
hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at my hand and, sure enough, the invitation
to the mysterious ball is right there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you've been invited to the ball as well? Good
for you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You'll have the opportunity to witness this social
butterfly's dancing with your very own eyes!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Such delights don't come your way very often, am
I right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, I'm sure there'll be rumors running
wild. "Who's that elegant lady over there? Why, it
can only be..."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why the upward inflection? Say it with
conviction! "King!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I shall make sure all eyes are focused on me when
I dance with Fuji at the ball!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But... if I'm going to perform alongside Fuji, I
have to make sure I'm extremely well prepared.
choice_data_list: That sounds like a lot of work.
That sounds like a lot of work.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't act like it doesn't concern you! Now that
you've been invited, you must strive to be the
best you can be as well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Start by changing your mindset. Now, try giving me some advice as to how I should begin.
choice_data_list:
Practice a dance that will capture everyone's
attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm, interesting.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the belle of the ball must capture the
gaze of everyone in attendance.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It is by wearing one's outfit with pride and
dancing with the grace of a butterfly that one
becomes first-rate. I see you've done some
studying.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I must start my intense training at once! Behold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SPLOSH!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Th-that's f-f-freezing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo's resolve is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pours water over herself to add extra strain
on her body as she dances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also frequents an amusement park to learn
from the dancers in the parades.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: To maintain a smile and excellent posture even while wearing a heavy outfit... This is what I strive to achieve. But no, I must go further!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This continues over the course of a few days...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What do you make of my magnificent moves? I'm
not known as "first-rate" for no reason, you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sleeves of her signature racewear flutter like
the wings of a dancing butterfly... She has
mastered the dance style she's been longing for.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate outfit... Yes, those who are first-rate
must stand at the summit of fashion.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I must set off on a journey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Project King

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mornings start early for King Halo. She goes
through numerous books trying to find inspiration
for the perfect dress.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Classical, yet eye-catching... Then it has to be...
Yes, of course... This one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When one is first-rate, there can be no
compromise. She climbs a precarious mountain
path to procure the ultimate fabric from a
legendary weaver.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Who in the world... would think... to live... in a
place like this?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Cough, splutter! There's so much dust...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In search of a famous dressmaker, she charters a
boat to cross the seas.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wait, seriously now?! Does someone actually live
here?!

text_block_list.name: Sailor
text_block_list.text: Haha! No, I'm just messin' with you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You've got to be kidding! No joking around! Let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After overcoming many hardships, King Halo
finds her way home. The purpose of her entire
journey was to obtain this single outfit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well? How does it look? I got my signature
racewear retailored to perfection!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! OHOHOHO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's meticulous attention to detail renders
me powerless to ask what's changed about the
outfit. At any rate, her hard work has paid off.
